summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Suhas Dhamapurkar's data analyst portfolio completed successfully. All 12 required features are working correctly with no critical issues found.
passed_tests: Header shows correct branding: 'Suhas Dhamapurkar | Data Analyst | Analytics Engineer' with SD logo
Navigation menu contains all required items: About, Platform, Projects, Visuals, Skills, GitHub, Contact
Project cards display images from /assets/ folder properly
Launch Demo buttons open correct Streamlit URLs in new tabs for Customer Churn and Retail Sales projects
Demo Coming Soon tooltip shows for projects without demo URLs
Project cards have hover animation effects (lift and shadow)
Interactive Recharts visualizations render correctly: Revenue Forecast, Churn Drivers, Skill Radar
Resume download button links to /resume.pdf and opens in new tab
Contact form opens email client on submit with pre-filled subject and body
Preview modal opens with iframe when clicking Preview in Modal button for demos
Mobile menu toggle works correctly on smaller screens (390px viewport)
Resilytics is properly presented as Featured Analytics Platform project
All GitHub links point to correct repositories
Light/clean professional theme is implemented correctly
All navigation links work and scroll to correct sections
